what_went_well: Full audit of all 24 active OpenSpec changes completed
Cross-referenced every roadmap item against actual tasks.md files
Found that 22 of 24 task counts were already correct — minimal drift

improvement_suggestions: Consider adding a CI check or make target that automatically verifies ROADMAP.md task counts against openspec list output
The openspec tool counts only top-level tasks while ROADMAP.md includes sub-tasks — standardizing on one method would prevent future confusion
deviations_from_spec: The task description mentioned the date says 'March 18, 2025' but it already shows 'March 30, 2026' — no date update needed
